'''wazazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignimbrite|ignimbrite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignimbrite|ignimbrite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wazazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzæzhæth|wæzæzhæth]] || [[word:wæzæzhæj|wæzæzhæj]] || [[word:wæzæzhæsh|wæzæzhæsh]] || [[word:wæzæzhæ|wæzæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazazazhath|wazazazhath]] || [[word:wazazazhaj|wazazazhaj]] || [[word:wazazazhash|wazazazhash]] || [[word:wazazazha|wazazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazazhath|wazazhath]] || [[word:wazazhaj|wazazhaj]] || [[word:wazazhash|wazazhash]] || [[word:wazazha|wazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazafzhafth|wazafzhafth]] || [[word:wazafzhafj|wazafzhafj]] || [[word:wazafzhafsh|wazafzhafsh]] || [[word:wazafzhaf|wazafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazazhatha|wazazhatha]] || [[word:wazazhaja|wazazhaja]] || [[word:wazazhasha|wazazhasha]] || [[word:wazazhaka|wazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazazhath|wazazhath]] || [[word:wazazhaj|wazazhaj]] || [[word:wazazhash|wazazhash]] || [[word:wazazha|wazazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazazhathal|wazazhathal]] || [[word:wazazhajal|wazazhajal]] || [[word:wazazhashal|wazazhashal]] || [[word:wazazhakal|wazazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazazhaathatha|wazazhaathatha]] || [[word:wazazhaajaja|wazazhaajaja]] || [[word:wazazhaashasha|wazazhaashasha]] || [[word:wazazhaaka|wazazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazazhathan|wazazhathan]] || [[word:wazazhajan|wazazhajan]] || [[word:wazazhashan|wazazhashan]] || [[word:wazazhakan|wazazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazazhathaoro|wazazhathaoro]] || [[word:wazazhajaoro|wazazhajaoro]] || [[word:wazazhashaoro|wazazhashaoro]] || [[word:wazazhakaoro|wazazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
